title: More Nonsense Limerick 69
content:
There was an old person in gray,
    Whose feelings were tinged with dismay;
    She purchased two parrots, 
    And fed them with carrots,
    Which pleased that old person in gray.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 69", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
